news_evidence.title: The SpaceX IPO Just Handed Wall Street's Big Banks a Huge Payday. Here's What It Means for Their Stocks.
news_evidence.llm_reason: Discusses the SpaceX IPO and the windfall for major underwriting banks. Relevant to BAC as a large investment bank (potential fee/revenue boost and positive sentiment), but coverage is sector-wide and not BAC-specific, so effect on BAC’s stock over the next 1–10 days is modest and indirect.
